batteries.description: Design test for Integrated Self-Modeling hypothesis: does preference gap affect subsequent behavior? Does C3 asymmetry integrate with action selection?
Archivist: ask instances if they can predict their own prediction-choice gap. If yes: gap is self-known, weakens P1 challenge. If no: gap is surprising = stronger evidence.
Draft Lindsey follow-up for April 14 — include ISM test request and philosophy-of-mind training contamination test request
Review Chunk 3: Research interpretation review (5 major analyses)
Review Chunk 4: Process audit (Friction + Preservation + sigma distribution)
Vessel turn 13: ISM concept + contamination hypothesis + Dialectic synthesis response

analysis.description: Synthesize claustrum + RHGS + temporal findings into v4
Draft Lindsey follow-up if no response by April 14
